key_insights.insight: Time blocking can be a game changer for completing tasks, especially on weekends when there's a lack of external structure.
key_insights.quote: Clean house would become at 11 till 12 i clean the kitchen because then it's like time sensitive and like task specific.

key_insights.insight: Focusing on making tasks fun can significantly increase intrinsic motivation and reduce procrastination.
key_insights.quote: The thing that I found that actually moves the needle is focusing on trying to make it fun.

key_insights.insight: Reframing 'have to' to 'get to' can shift your mindset and improve your enjoyment of a task.
key_insights.quote: Instead of thinking of have to think of it as get to, I realized, oh, I get to put in this cannula, I get to make a difference in this patient's lives and life and give her fluids overnight so that she's not going to dehydrate because of her morning sickness.

key_insights.insight: Intrinsic motivation stems from finding something enjoyable in itself, not from external pressures.
key_insights.quote: Fun basically means intrinsic motivation like something is sufficiently enjoyable that you do it for its own sake rather than for the fact that you've got a sponsor helping you or you've got a deadline or things like that.

actionable_advice.advice: Implement time blocking on weekends to structure your time and tackle tasks effectively.
actionable_advice.how_to: Allocate specific time slots (e.g., 11 AM - 12 PM) to particular tasks on your calendar to create a sense of urgency and focus.

actionable_advice.advice: Reframe your mindset from 'I have to do this' to 'I get to do this' when facing unpleasant tasks.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify the potential benefits or positive aspects of the task, focusing on how it contributes to a larger goal or helps others.

memorable_stories: Story about putting in a cannula for a patient after a long shift, and shifting his mindset to 'I get to do this' after hearing a patient compliment the NHS.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 55 - This Method Will Boost Your Productivity: Ali Abdaal
